device_name: Rooti Rx ECG Event Recorder, Rooti Link APP Software
intended_use: The intended use of the Rooti Rx System is to allow a patient at home or in the workplace to record single-lead electrocardiography (ECG) data for post-analysis by medical professionals. The Rooti Rx
intended_use_full: The intended use of the Rooti Rx System is to allow a patient at home or in the workplace to record single-lead electrocardiography (ECG) data for post-analysis by medical professionals. The Rooti Rx device stores the ECG data, and the recorded data is transmitted to a medical professional's iOS device via Wi-Fi at a later time.
target_condition: Cardiac arrhythmias or other ECG abnormalities requiring monitoring
